overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing an astronaut character exploring a spaceship interior. The character walks through a narrow metallic corridor with wooden flooring and industrial piping, pauses at a junction to observe a dining area, then enters an adjacent workshop room.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow spaceship corridor with industrial piping and wooden flooring

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward the pressure doorways at the end

entered.detail: industrial metal paneling with visible rivets and piping running along both sides
light brown wooden decking covering the corridor floor
large cylindrical ventilation ducts and cables running overhead
round illuminated light fixture mounted on the left wall
large rectangular window showing starfield and space outside
tall metal storage cabinets with equipment on the left side
simple yellow chair placed against the left wall
tall rectangular waste container with blue and yellow markings
heavy metal door frame with hydraulic mechanisms at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, warmly lit corridor with wooden flooring and industrial metal walls. Exposed pipes run along the ceiling, while a viewport window on the right reveals the darkness of space outside. The character passes a yellow chair and storage bins while approaching the pressure doorways at the end of the hall.

events.description: character stops walking and pauses to look into the dining room on the right

agents.ego_description: standing at the doorway threshold observing the dining area inside the right room

entered.detail: rectangular wooden table with chairs arranged around it
countertop with appliances and storage cabinets along the right wall
illuminated pendant light fixture hanging above the dining table
green leafy plant in a pot visible in the corner

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the corridor's end where it opens into two rooms. The camera pans to reveal a dining area through the right doorway, showing a wooden table set, kitchen counter, and hanging light fixture. The pressure door arch now frames the immediate foreground while the corridor elements fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: workshop room with metal shelving and equipment

events.description: character turns left and enters the workshop room through the left doorway

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking into the workshop room filled with shelves and work equipment

entered.detail: tall industrial metal shelves holding various equipment and boxes
swivel chair positioned near the workbench area
cluttered work surface with tools and electronic devices
articulated lamp on the workbench providing task lighting

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and enters the workshop room, leaving the dining area behind. The space contains metal shelving units filled with equipment, a workbench with tools, and an office chair. The pressure door arch recedes to the right as the character moves deeper into the new room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial corridor that opens into a domestic dining area before shifting into a functional workshop. It begins by following the character down a warmly lit hallway with wooden flooring and exposed ceiling pipes, passing a viewport that looks out into the darkness of space. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the camera pans right to reveal a dining area featuring a set wooden table and kitchen counter framed by a pressure door arch. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, leaving the dining space behind to enter a workshop filled with metal shelving, a workbench, and tools. The pressure door recedes into the background as the camera moves deeper into the equipment-filled room.
